name: player_season_min_ranking range year_offset takes the window MIN
description: min rank is the best (lowest) rank in the offset window -> MIN, not SUM.
expected_query: select "player"."pid", player.fname, player.lname, (SELECT MIN(player_rankings_index.min) FROM player_rankings_index WHERE player_rankings_index.pid = player.pid AND player_rankings_index.year IN (2024,2025) AND player_rankings_index.source_id IN ('FANTASYPROS') AND player_rankings_index.ranking_type IN ('PPR_REDRAFT')) AS "min_rank_0", "player"."pos" from "player" group by player.fname, player.lname, "player"."pid", "player"."lname", "player"."fname", "player"."pos" order by "player"."pid" asc limit 500
